craigslist.title: Luxury Model Home with 1st-Floor Primary Suite – Steps from Cosby High
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Luxury Model Home with 1st-Floor Primary Suite – Steps from Cosby High! 6489 Lila Crest Lane, Midlothian, VA 23112 3895.00 / Month 4 BEDROOMS | 3 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6NDc4MjA1?property=2721024&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/6489-lila-crest-lane-midlothian-va/95bcd3d0-652f-4363-befb-3146252d7fd2?source=craigslist Property Description: Experience the pinnacle of executive, maintenance-free luxury living at 6489 Lila Crest Lane. Custom-built as the premier Mungo Homes flagship showcase model, this pristine estate offers a brand-new build feel packed with elite architectural details, custom trim work, and high-end designer selections throughout. Spanning a rare 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom layout, this home is expertly designed for comfort and privacy. The main level features a magnificent private primary suite complete with a luxury spa-like bath, dual vanities, an oversized glass shower enclosure, and a massive walk-in closet. The heart of the home is a sun-drenched, open-concept family room that flows into a gourmet chef's kitchen boasting premium cabinetry, upgraded stone countertops, a large center island, and stainless steel appliances. A bright laundry room with a large window sits conveniently right off the entryway. Upstairs, three additional oversized bedrooms—each with its own private walk-in closet—offer the perfect space for a family or a quiet executive home office. Step outside to your private back porch to enjoy peaceful, scenic views of the mature woods and nature trails directly behind the home. Location & Lifestyle Highlights: Walk to School: A peaceful 0.25-mile walk directly to award-winning Cosby High School and local campuses. Convenience: Under 1 mile to Publix, ALDI, and upscale dining and shopping along Hull Street. HOA Perks: Includes neighborhood trails, a social pavilion with a fire pit, and fully handled professional lawn care for a true lock-and-leave lifestyle. Terms: Rent: $3,985/mo | Available: Sept 1 Qualifications: Multi-year stability preferred. Strict background check, 700+ credit, and verified proof of 3x monthly income required. Owner/broker. Property Type : Single Family Pets : Cats, Small Dogs, Large Dogs Allowed Smoking : NO Lease Term : 3895.00 / Month 3895.00 Deposit Lease Length: One Year Available: 09/01/2026 Occupancy Limit: No Limit Utilities Included : Appliances : Dishwasher Garbage Disposal Microwave Range Oven Refrigerator Amenities : Fireplace Lawn Near Parks Cable Ready Bicycle Parking Balcony Or Deck Vaulted Ceiling Wired For Internet Heating & Cooling : Forced Air Central Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6NDc4MjA1?property=2721024&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/6489-lila-crest-lane-midlothian-va/95bcd3d0-652f-4363-befb-3146252d7fd2?source=craigslist
